{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/70860524?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Gayang2902", "id": 70860524, "login": "Gayang2902", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjcwODYwNTI0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gayang2902", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44458", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-74", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component ('Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-116", "name": "Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output"}], "description": "### Summary

The JSX renderer escapes `style` attribute object values for HTML but not for CSS. Untrusted input in a `style` object value or property name can therefore inject additional CSS declarations into the rendered `style` attribute. The impact is limited to CSS and does not allow JavaScript execution or HTML attribute breakout.

### Details

`style` object values are serialized into a CSS declaration list and escaped for HTML attribute context only. Characters that act as CSS declaration boundaries — such as `;`, comment markers, quoted strings, and block delimiters — are valid in HTML attribute content and can extend a value beyond its assigned property.

This issue arises when untrusted input is interpolated into a JSX `style` object and rendered server-side.

### Impact

An attacker who can control the value or property name of a `style` object may inject arbitrary CSS declarations. This may lead to:

- Visual manipulation of the page, including full-viewport overlays usable for phishing
- Outbound requests to attacker-controlled hosts via CSS resource references such as `url(...)`
- Hijacking of UI affordances through layout, positioning, or visibility changes

This issue affects applications that render JSX on the server with `style` object values or property names derived from untrusted input.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00197, "percentile": 0.09529}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-09T00:46:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44458"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-09T00:46:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "Hono has CSS Declaration Injection via Style Object Values in JSX SSR", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-09T00:46:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp7p-654g-cw7p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hono has CSS Declaration Injection via Style Object Values in JSX SSR
